g.text: Trace: "Car arrives at entrance gate. System finds a free spot on Level 1, issues ticket. Car exits, price calculated, payment processed, spot freed."
pricing, and payment. Two simple APIs:
has a number plate and a type
vehicle, which level, which spot, and
entry timestamp. Used at exit to
If payment fails, spot stays occupied."
Get level + type + spot from ticket.
spot. If false: spot stays occupied."
levels -> ParkingLevel checks VehicleType manager -> ParkingSpot
Vehicle has type (TWO/FOUR_WHEELER). Ticket issued on entry
EntranceGate allocates. ExitGate prices + processes payment
FixedPricingStrategy returns Rs 100. CostComputation wraps it
